response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has extensive software development experience and a strong background in developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators, AI-agent infrastructure, testing libraries). However, her people management experience is limited to informal roles (e.g., organizing workshops, mentoring) rather than formal leadership, and she lacks direct experience with mobile platforms. Her technical leadership is evident, but the role requires mid-to-senior management with a clear track record in people leadership.
strengths: Strong technical expertise in developer tools and testing infrastructure
Proven track record in cross-functional collaboration and technical leadership
Hands-on experience with code review, system design, and CI/CD practices
concerns: Limited formal people management experience (only informal mentoring/workshops)
No explicit mobile platform knowledge or experience
Inconsistent tenure at roles (frequent job changes may raise concerns about long-term commitment)
